example_tasks: Redirect project resources to new initiative
Adjust project timeline based on feedback
Navigate to the new office location
Take the next exit on the route
Reorient team goals for the quarter
Follow the path to the main entrance
Shift priorities for the upcoming week
Follow the directional signs to the venue
reasoning: The icon clearly represents a change in direction or a turn. It is useful for tasks involving pivots, navigation, or shifting focus, but it is too abstract for general task management.
